pi_items.source: Task description states 'URL Key coming-soon'; verified in setup_task.sh line 16, export_result.sh line 14; Magento CMS pages use identifier field for URL key
Task description explicitly states 'create a new CMS Page with the title Coming Soon'; title is distinct from identifier/URL key in Magento

Task description specifies page content '

We are launching soon!

Stay tuned for our grand opening.

'; verifier.py line 31 confirms this expected snippet

Magento 2 official configuration path for setting CMS Home Page; verified in multiple sources and used in setup_task.sh line 18-19, export_result.sh line 36; path is used to set the homepage in core_config_data table
Magento 2 official configuration path for Demo Store Notice; verified in multiple sources; used in setup_task.sh line 21-22, export_result.sh line 41; value is '1' for enabled, '0' for disabled

privileged_info_summary:
This is a real Magento 2 Open Source e-commerce system (not synthetic). The task configures a soft launch state by: (1) creating a CMS page with identifier 'coming-soon', title 'Coming Soon', and content containing '

We are launching soon!

'; (2) setting the homepage to this new page via the 'web/default/cms_home_page' configuration path in the core_config_data table; (3) enabling the Demo Store Notice by setting 'design/head/demonotice' to '1' in core_config_data. All configuration paths and values correspond to standard Magento 2 settings accessible via Stores > Configuration in the admin interface.
